copy.bulletinIntro: Hall notes, event calls, raffles, and updates keep the guild moving.
copy.doorsIntro: Step through the join path, ranks, leaders, and Codex that keep Mōchirīī on the path.
copy.spotlightIntro: A shoutout for a member whose care keeps the hall alive.
copy.galleryIntro: Screenshots from runs, quiet roads, and moments that become guild memory.

descriptor: Mōchirīī is a guild hall for players who want company, events, runs, and rest between adventures.
Step in through Discord, read the joining path, and grow at your own pace. Check event notes, RSVP when planning helps, and bring lantern warmth to the hall.

seal.title: Guild Seal
verse: Silvered jade softly gleams, where quiet petals fall,
Bamboo stands in patient grace, a guardian to all.
Hearts gather here in gentle light, unhurried, warm & true,
A seal of trust, of shared resolve, where kindred spirits grew.

bulletins.title: Monthly hall meeting to gather, plan, and be heard.
Monthly cosmetics raffle for members who keep the table bright.
Leadership roles are open for members ready to carry a lantern with care.
